name: india-storyboard-memes
note: Curated meme-edit units for geopolitical reels. Geopolitical + universal + Bollywood/desi only (NO domestic-partisan). Each unit = metadata + a fetch-ref; media fetched with attribution (free APIs / yt-dlp fair-use / FLUX-generated). The tone gate still applies: NEVER on a tragedy/victim beat.

sourceKinds.giphy: Giphy GIF search (free API; embed per ToS, attribute)
sourceKinds.ytclip: yt-dlp public clip (short, fair-use commentary, attributed) — the clip: pipeline

units.name: Facepalm
units.use: a leader/country does something dumb — react to a blunder/gaffe

units.name: Side-eye
units.use: a suspicious/hypocritical claim — silent skepticism

units.name: Surprised Pikachu
units.use: an obvious consequence someone acts shocked by ('you did X, and X happened?!')

units.name: This is fine (dog in fire)
units.use: everything is collapsing but the official line is 'all under control'

units.name: Mic drop
units.use: a devastating fact/comeback lands — end the point

units.name: Popcorn / eating popcorn
units.use: two sides feuding — the audience just watches the drama

units.name: Sweating over two buttons
units.use: a leader stuck between two bad choices

units.name: Confused math lady
units.use: an argument/number that makes no sense
units.vibe: trying to make it add up

units.name: Blinking white guy
units.use: a claim so baffling you just blink

units.name: Narrator: 'It was not'
units.use: undercut an optimistic official claim with reality

units.name: Crying face
units.use: a humiliating loss/L for a side

units.name: Nervous laugh
units.use: an awkward, deniable moment

units.name: Eye roll
units.use: a tired, predictable talking point

units.name: Slow clap
units.use: sarcastic 'congratulations' for a self-inflicted mess

units.name: Spider-Man pointing
units.use: two sides blaming each other while being identical

units.name: 'Inevitable'
units.use: an outcome everyone saw coming

units.name: Leo cheers-ing

units.name: Drake no/yes
units.use: reject the sensible option, prefer the dumb one

units.use: punctuate a dramatic reveal / a mic-drop line

units.name: Record scratch
units.use: freeze on an absurd moment ('yep, that's me — you're probably wondering…')

units.name: Sad violin (world's smallest)
units.use: mock-sympathy for a powerful whiner

units.name: Air horn (MLG)
units.use: hype a ridiculous flex / an over-the-top claim

units.name: 'Bruh'

units.name: Roblox 'oof'

units.name: Cinematic BRAAAM

units.name: 'Oh teri!'

units.name: Anime 'wow'

units.name: Dramatic zoom-in + sting

units.use: a chain of bad reasoning that ends in full clown

units.name: Callback / running gag
units.use: plant a phrase/image early, snap back to it at the close for a payoff

units.name: Rule of three
units.use: two straight items, the third absurd/deflating

source.ref: a writing device: a three-item list where the third subverts

units.name: Deadpan tag line
units.use: state the absurd fact flat, then a tiny dry tag ('zero surprise')

source.ref: a narration device: a flat fact + a one-line dry aside

units.name: Mock-sympathy for the powerful
units.use: fake pity for a powerful whiner, pair with sound-sad-violin

units.name: Butt-of-the-joke target (punch up)
units.use: make POWER/hypocrisy the fool — never a victim

source.ref: a narration device: the powerful/hypocritical actor is the fool; NEVER a victim

units.name: Absurd desi analogy
units.use: map a serious geopolitics moment onto a mundane desi scene

source.ref: a narration device: 'ye toh society ke us aadmi jaisa hai jo…'

units.name: Anticlimax / bathos
units.use: build up huge, then deflate to something mundane

source.ref: a narration device: dramatic buildup + a flat mundane payoff

units.use: someone confidently MISLABELS a thing (a gaffe, calling X the wrong name)
